headline: Valero Bond Sale And Sustainable Fuels Shift Reshape Risk Reward Profile
summary: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) has completed an $849.87 million fixed-income offering with notes due 2036. The company is advancing projects in sustainable fuels alongside refinery optimization efforts. These moves arrive during a period of heightened geopolitical and regulatory pressure on the energy sector. Valero Energy is a large independent refiner and marketer, so its funding decisions and capital projects matter if you follow downstream energy. This new bond issuance gives the company a...

headline: 4 High Yield Refiners Built for Exactly These Spiking Oil Prices and Geopolitical Swings
summary: When crude prices surge on geopolitical shock, refiners do not all respond equally. The death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on February 28, 2026, per NPR reporting, sent immediate shockwaves through energy markets.
